subcodes.first_line: O descendant of His Holiness the martyr! Thy letter of the 29th of Rabi'u'th-Thani was received, and from its contents I have learned [3.5s]... ...The Teachings of Baha'o'llah, the laws of this Cause and the principles of this Manifestation have no deniers. The world is like unto a thirsty fish
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حضرت شهید عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه ۲۹ ربیع الثانی رسید و از تفاصیل اطلاع
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
